description:
Learn how IHS Markit (now part of S&P Global) architected a solution to enable customers working from home to gain hands-on training for their petrotechnical interpretation software in a performant and cost-effective manner. The solution uses AppStream 2.0 to deliver Kingdom right onto a customer’s browser, using RDS and FSx for data and file storage, and Lambda to enable automation.

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​ cloud: 
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO

#AWS #ThisIsMyArchitecture
fulltitle: IHS Markit: Virtual Instructor-Led Trainings with IHS Markit (now part of S&P Global)
